missions.title: Chemical Bonding and Molecular Structure - Section 1
missions.description: Comprehensive analysis covering Lewis structures, octet rule exceptions, ionic bond and more.

microtargets.title: Lewis structures
mustKnowFacts: Lewis structures is a fundamental subtopic of Chemical Bonding and Molecular Structure.
Crucial to understand the principles governing Lewis structures for NEET.
commonTraps: Students often misinterpret Lewis structures during complex MCQs.
Failing to apply the correct logic for Lewis structures.
masteryCriteria: Can accurately solve numericals or identify structures related to Lewis structures.
pyqPatterns: Past year questions frequently ask about Lewis structures.

activeRecallQuestions.question: Explain the core concept behind Lewis structures.
What is a common trap associated with Lewis structures?
